title: Chrysanthemum grubovii
taxonomy: Chrysanthemum grubovii is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to China, specifically the Sichuan and Yunnan provinces. The classification of Chrysanthemum grubovii is within the genus Chrysanthemum, which is part of the tribe Anthemideae. Chrysanthemum grubovii is further classified as a member of the family Asteraceae, which is divided into several subfamilies, including the subfamily Asteroideae. As of my knowledge cutoff, I do not have further classification information available.
